final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because account status is critical for lenders to inspect, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[1]
The fact that the checking account balance is negative, because there is no statistical evidence within the text to support or refute the relationship, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[2]
The fact that the loan duration is extended, because extended loan durations are positively associated with credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 대출 기관이 신용 위험을 평가하는 데 중요한 요소이지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
체크링 계좌 잔액이 음수인 경우는 통계적 근거가 부족하지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
대출 기간이 길어질수록 신용 위험이 증가한다고 알려져 있지만, 본 모델은 이 요인을 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 분류합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
